content.title: Type 'Product' failed to compile
content.message: The node type 'Northwind/Product' was parked after a compile failure and will not be retried until its source is fixed. Failed to load assembly at /Users/roland/code/MeshWeaver/memex/Memex.Portal.Monolith/bin/Debug/net10.0/.mesh-cache/Northwind_Product_8ded364aefb9578/Northwind_Product.dll — the build is not usable (corrupt cached .dll or a missing dependency).
